stories.headline: Dangerous Drivers
stories.summary: Investigation into Montgomery County's lenient handling of repeat offenders in drunken driving cases, uncovering systemic prosecutorial lapses.

stories.headline: Airport Insecurity
stories.summary: Following the 9/11 attacks, news organizations relied on CAR (Computer Assisted Reporting) and FAA enforcement databases to investigate airport security vulnerabilities, but the FAA quickly restricted access to the data it had previously made public.
